system.description: A silver or gold figurine mounted on a pole above the armys standard. The emblem is treasured by the army as the symbol of its strength, honor, and glory. If an armys standard is not provided with an emblem, its morale score is reduced by 1. Loss of an armys standard and/or emblem reduces its morale score by 1 and counts as a calamity (p. XX). In the Auran Empire, the emblem of its armies is the winged sun.
